scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Center**: Paved asphalt road with visible cracks. White solid lines mark both left and right edges of the road. The road curves slightly left in the distance.  
- **Left foreground**: Tall green grass bordering the road. A white cylindrical post (height ~1–1.2 meters) with a narrow black band near the bottom is positioned close to the road’s left edge. A tall birch tree (light gray bark, green leaves) stands at the left edge of the road, partially obscuring the grassy area.  
- **Right foreground**: Tall green grass bordering the road. A white cylindrical post (height ~1–1.2 meters) with a red and orange square-shaped symbol near the top is positioned close to the road’s right edge. A second white post with the same red/orange square symbol is visible further along the right edge of the road (mid-foreground).  

### Midground  
- **Left side**: A grassy field with tall green grass extends from the road edge to the background, bordered by scattered small trees and a larger, dense green tree near the road (left of center).  
- **Right side**: A field with rows of green vegetation (e.g., crops or grass) slopes slightly upward. Dense trees and underbrush border the field, extending toward the background. White cylindrical posts with red/orange square symbols are spaced along the road’s right edge (e.g., one at the mid-foreground right, another further back).  
- **Road**: The asphalt road continues straight before curving left. White solid edge lines persist along both sides.  

### Background  
- **Left and right**: A dense line of deciduous trees (broad leaves, varying green foliage) forms a forested area beyond the fields.  
- **Sky**: Blue sky with scattered white clouds above the tree line.  

### Additional Details  
- **Text & Signs**: No visible text on signs, markers, or plates. Road markers feature color symbols (black band, red/orange square) but no transcribable text.  
- **Infrastructure**: No utility poles, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails. Road markers (white cylindrical posts with color symbols) are the only infrastructure elements.  
- **Vehicles & Plates**: No vehicles or license plates visible.  
- **Road Surface & Markings**: Asphalt road with white solid edge lines (left and right). Curb is absent; road edges are defined by the white lines.  
- **Buildings & Architecture**: No buildings, walls, or fences present.  
- **Vegetation & Terrain**: Dominated by tall green grass, deciduous trees (including a birch tree in the left foreground), and open fields. Terrain is flat to gently sloping. No coniferous trees or palm trees are visible.

details.name: white bollard with black band
details.reason: The specific color pattern on the delineator is a useful regional indicator.
details.focused_description: white bollard (cylindrical/rectangular post) with a black rectangular band (frame) surrounding an orange rectangular section; the bollard is white, solid, vertical, and appears to be made of a rigid material; the black band is a thin, rectangular outline, and the orange section inside the band is solid; no visible text.

details.name: white edge lines
details.reason: The color and style of road edge markings help distinguish between different regional driving standards.
details.focused_description: The white edge lines are two continuous white lines running parallel to the edges of the road, one on the left and one on the right. They are painted on the asphalt surface, with a smooth, straight shape that curves slightly to follow the road's alignment. The lines are bright white, appear to be in good condition (no visible breaks or fading), and are composed of painted material. No text is present on the lines.
